data.body: Starting epic cite-stone-sea (9f78-ccbf-9248-4097): 11-story plan-review-gate upgrade. Fresh worktree epic-cite-stone-sea off origin/main 6a28e9a5a. Gates on (plan-review claim + completion close), API key present, gerrit reachable. Order: review-plan+claim epic, WS1->WS6->WS7, WS2/WS3/WS11, WS4, WS5, WS8/WS9, WS10 last; stacked Gerrit changes landed together.
